purpose: Persist source-backed lessons from the Ascend TorchTitan-NPU/CANN DeepSeek-V4 MoE/EP recipe and map them to the AMD MORI+AITER owner-backward path.

ascend_lessons.name: pure_fsdp_plus_large_ep
ascend_lessons.read: Ascend's main recipe uses TP1/PP1 with large EP and FSDP. This supports the AMD TP1/PP1/CP1/FSDP4/EP4 canary path.

ascend_lessons.name: separate_fsdp_ep_process_groups
ascend_lessons.read: Ascend reports that separating FSDP and EP process groups lets FSDP and EP communication run on independent HCCL streams, reducing MoE communication wait from longest observed 10 ms to about 3 ms.

ascend_lessons.name: native_grouped_expert_gemm
ascend_lessons.read: Ascend replaces GroupedExperts with npu_grouped_matmul, fuses W1/W3 into W13, runs grouped W13, npu_swiglu, then grouped W2, with grouped matmul backward for dinput and dweight.

ascend_lessons.name: compact_route_metadata_not_full_routed_output
ascend_lessons.read: Ascend's token unpermute autograd saves sorted_indices and restore_shape, avoiding full routed_output storage during backprop.

ascend_lessons.name: fine_grained_recompute_future_work
ascend_lessons.read: Ascend tolerates full activation checkpointing, but the report still names finer on-demand recompute as future work to avoid redundant vector recompute.

ascend_lessons.name: autofuse_vector_clutter_reduction
ascend_lessons.read: Ascend AutoFuse gains come from fusing vector/reduction/cast/broadcast fragments and reducing host-bound dispatch. AMD should map this to fused AITER/CK/Triton/HIP epilogues, not more Python wrappers.

ascend_lessons.name: ep_compute_comm_pipeline_future_work
ascend_lessons.read: Ascend notes MC2 or EP-domain compute/communication pipeline scheduling is not integrated yet, so AMD should first fix owner VJP math before deeper MORI overlap work.

amd_current_evidence.remaining_wall: Python per-expert owner VJP plus dX-return wait/skew; profile shows saved-dispatch overhead itself is tiny.

stage1_capture.read: Post-SwiGLU stage1 hidden can be exposed from AITER two-stage forward, but raw gate, raw up, and compact per-route W2 output are still missing.

do_not_do: Do not replace AITER fused forward with a padded PyTorch-style forward just to save activations.
Do not save padded per-expert slabs.
do_next: Add AITER/CK training-backward contract that either exposes raw gate/up/hidden/output compact state or recomputes gate/up once inside a fused grouped owner VJP.
Emit dW13, dW2, dX, and dTopkWeight through a compact owner-rank training backward.
After owner VJP is fixed, reduce dX-return skew and overlap MORI combine earlier or in chunks.
